case_title: ELITE SAN FRANCISCO VS WASHINGTON TIFFANY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,109.00 FILED BY ELITE SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON TIFFANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-08-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON TIFFANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELITE SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WASHINGTON TIFFANY $1,109.00 PRINCIPAL, $44.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,153.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT WASHINGTON TIFFANY HEARING SET FOR JUL-25-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 04
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUL-25-1991, GRANTED
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON TIFFANY
